images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese idol‑style influencer, flawless yet natural skin with visible pores, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, standing on a skyscraper observation deck at twilight, dressed in an oversized slate‑grey hoodie that slips off one shoulder to hint at a delicate lace camisole beneath, paired with tiny black hot‑pants that accentuate her slim waist and curvy hips, her straight, silky black hair falling over her shoulders; she is caught in a spontaneous, genuine laugh, eyes bright with joy, cheeks flushed, the scene illuminated by bright, sparkling reflections from a nearby disco ball that cast clean, soft light across her face and the polished deck, with no heavy shadows. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field blurring the glass railing and cityscape into creamy bokeh, ray‑traced reflections and global illumination enhance the natural sheen of her skin. The image is finished in a classic black‑and‑white portrait grade, evoking a 90s retro film vibe, playful, cute and timeless.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a striking Japanese idol‑style model, 21 years old, standing inside a sleek glass‑enclosed telephone booth on a rain‑slicked Tokyo street at night. She wears a form‑fitting backless evening gown in midnight‑black silk with delicate lace panels that hug her slim waist and ample bust, the fabric catching the vibrant neon glow of a nearby “Yoga” sign. Her straight, silky black hair falls over one shoulder, revealing flawless yet realistically textured skin—visible pores and faint vellus hair under the bright, even neon illumination. A confident smirk plays on her lips as she tilts her head, eyes glancing flirtatiously at the camera. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field creates a soft bokeh that isolates her against the blurred urban backdrop, while ray‑tracing and global illumination capture the luminous neon reflections on her gown and city‑lit rain‑slicked pavement, all rendered in a Fujifilm‑style color simulation for a cinematic, high‑fashion finish.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning adult Japanese idol‑influencer seated in the passenger seat of a sleek convertible, the desert dunes stretching behind her under a soft blue‑hour glow. She wears a high‑collar, tight‑fitting Merino‑wool turtleneck that clings to her slender waist, ample bust, and smooth, pored skin, the knit revealing subtle lace edges at the sleeves. Her straight black hair falls over one shoulder, a single strand catching the amber light. She delivers a playful one‑eye wink, her gaze direct yet coy, lips lightly glossed, cheeks tinged with a natural blush. The interior is bathed in a clean, minimalist palette; the dashboard’s matte charcoal reflects a faint violet neon. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens achieving razor‑thin depth of field, ray‑traced global illumination emphasizes the soft bokeh and the subtle sheen on her sweater, creating an ultra‑clean, high‑contrast, low‑saturation bleached‑color grade perfect for a viral Instagram portrait.8k photo, Large breasts
